primary_variables.matched_definition: Genetic perturbation that reduces or eliminates gene function.
evidence: To create an isogenic NF1 null cell line, we utilized CRISPR Cas9 targeting of NF1exon 2 to create inactivating indels in NF1 on both alleles
We investigated Protein-Protein Interactors (PPIs) and the global proteome of NF1 wild type (+/+) and null (-/-) human immortalized Schwann cells (ipn97.4).

primary_variables.matched_definition: Base or amino-acid substitution (for example SNV, point mutation, engineered missense).
evidence: stably transfected NF1 -/- cells with tagged mNf1 cDNAs (either WT or variant)
Variants were introduced into shuttle vectors by utilization of synthetic DNA fragments
We performed 3 replicates of each affinity purification using wildtype tagged mNf1 cDNA (WT) and variant tagged mNf1 (G848R, R1276Q, R1809C, and delM992)

attributes.route_or_context: CRISPR Cas9 knockout and cDNA stable transfection
evidence: we utilized CRISPR Cas9 targeting of NF1exon 2 to create inactivating indels in NF1 on both alleles
stably transfected NF1 -/- cells with tagged mNf1 cDNAs

attributes.route_or_context: stable transfection into NF1 -/- ipn97.4 cells
evidence: The following day cells were transfected with 2.5 ug of DNA and 5 uL of Lipo 3000 reagent for 24 h.
began selection with 500 ug/ml G418 for 14–21 days until there were enough cells to pick colonies for single-cell selection.

replicate_hints: We performed 3 replicates of each affinity purification
Each cell line (+/+, -/- WT, G848R, R1276Q, R1809C, and delM992) was sampled in triplicate.

evidence: ipn97.4 NF1 -/- compared to ipn97.4 NF1 +/+ cells
ipn97.4 NF1 -/- cells stably transfected with WT mNf1 cDNA compared to ipn97.4 NF1 -/- cells stably transfected with one of four variant mNf1 cDNA’s (G848R, R1276Q, R1809C, or delM992)

base_candidates_ranked.reason: The experiment used Data-Dependent Acquisition (DDA) and relative quantification via normalized spectral counting (N-SC), which is a label-free quantification (LFQ) approach.

modifier_candidates_ranked.reason: The study explicitly describes affinity mass spectrometry using Strep-tagged mNf1 cDNAs and StrepTactin XT beads to identify protein-protein interactors (PPIs).
